title: saxifraga × geum var. dentata
intro: Saxifraga × geum var. dentata, also known as the Saxifrage, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family, derived from the cross between Saxifraga and Geum species. Traditionally, Saxifrage has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and improve wound healing. Saxifrage can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used in folk medicine for its antiseptic and healing properties.
